title: Query error in hexadecimal
key_bug_features: Querying with hexadecimal representation of string values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE `t2` (`COL2` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_general_ci NOT NULL, `COL3` int NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE COL2 = 'mysql' AND COL3 = 1;
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE COL2 IS NULL;
